name: UploadProgress
summary: Represents the progress for a file upload operation.

constructors.name: UploadProgress
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the UploadProgress class with known total size.

params.name: totalBytes
params.doc: The total number of bytes to upload.

params.name: bytesUploaded
params.doc: The number of bytes uploaded so far.

properties.name: PercentComplete
properties.summary: Gets the upload progress as a percentage (0-100). If total is unknown, returns null. If null, it indicates we can't determine the completed percentage as we don't know the total size. UI should handle this case appropriately (e.g don't show percentage of completion but bytes upload).

properties.name: TotalBytes
properties.summary: Gets the total number of bytes to upload, 0 if total is unknown.

properties.name: UploadedBytes
properties.summary: Gets the number of bytes uploaded so far.
